UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GARNER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 7227 GEARY BLVFD #3, UPSTAIRS, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $261.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GARNER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, WALTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GARNER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON SEPTEMBER 2, 1998 $8,480.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $261.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,141.00, LEASE FORFEITED
